DEFENDANTS GEORGE TRAN and DWIGHT TRAN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to February 25, 2015 for Plaintiff to properly file opposition papers. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Elizabeth Erhardt, Esq. (415-366-6698) for Plaintiff and opposing party Jane Margaret Chavez.
No other appearances.

Plaintiff's counsel reports that the first amended complaint is filed. DEFENDANTs GEORGE TRAN and DWIGHT TRAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is moot, off calendar. The first amended complaint has been filed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
